narrative.description: Namco's 3D debut sends Pac-Man through ghost-infested worlds with butt-bounce attacks, zip-lines, and a birthday-rescue plot spanning linear stages and ghost boss encounters.
narrative.core_loop: Butt-bounce and chomp through 3D stages, rescue Pac-family members, collect fruit and pellets, and defeat Toc-Man.

mechanics.map_notes: Themed worlds are linear 3D gauntlets ending in ghost bosses.
mechanics.expression: Themed worlds are linear 3D gauntlets ending in ghost bosses.

mechanics.map_notes: Butt-bounce and chomp attacks clear ghosts and break obstacles.
mechanics.expression: Butt-bounce and chomp attacks clear ghosts and break obstacles.

mechanics.map_notes: Ghost bosses and family rescues unlock subsequent worlds.
mechanics.expression: Ghost bosses and family rescues unlock subsequent worlds.

mechanics.map_notes: Pellets, fruit, and letters gate bonus content.
mechanics.expression: Pellets, fruit, and letters gate bonus content.

mechanics.map_notes: Lives from fruit bonuses gate retries.
mechanics.expression: Lives from fruit bonuses gate retries.

mechanics.map_notes: Water, crushers, and mine carts test timing.
mechanics.expression: Water, crushers, and mine carts test timing.

mechanics.map_notes: Galaxian minigames and hidden paths extend replay.
mechanics.expression: Galaxian minigames and hidden paths extend replay.

mechanics.map_notes: Ghost bosses follow arena-specific attack loops.
mechanics.expression: Ghost bosses follow arena-specific attack loops.

mechanics.map_notes: Butt-bounce chains require exact platform spacing.
mechanics.expression: Butt-bounce chains require exact platform spacing.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss charge attacks telegraph with visible wind-up.
mechanics.expression: Boss charge attacks telegraph with visible wind-up.

mechanics.map_notes: Health depletes on ghost contact unless power pellet active.
mechanics.expression: Health depletes on ghost contact unless power pellet active.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Pac-Man World through its core platformer loop.
